title: SimilarWeb Traffic Scraper (official API, bring your own key)
description: Fetch website traffic and ranking data from the OFFICIAL Similarweb REST API using your own Similarweb API key. This Actor is not a no-key public-page scraper: a valid Similarweb API subscription and key are required. Runs without a key fail immediately and are not charged.

apiKey.title: Similarweb API key
apiKey.description: Your official Similarweb API key from your Similarweb account (Account > API, or provided by your Similarweb plan). Required. The Actor calls the official Similarweb REST API on your behalf and never scrapes public pages. Each domain consumes your own Similarweb API credits.

domains.title: Domains
domains.description: Website domains to look up, for example openai.com. Enter domains without https:// or www.

maxResults.title: Max domains
maxResults.description: Maximum number of domains from the list to query. Each domain uses your Similarweb API credits, so start with 1 for a low-cost test.

country.title: Country scope
country.description: Country scope for traffic and engagement metrics: use 'world' for worldwide, or a two-letter ISO country code such as us, gb, or in. The value must be included in your Similarweb subscription.

startDate.title: Start month (YYYY-MM)
startDate.description: Optional start month for traffic and engagement metrics in YYYY-MM format. Leave empty to use a recent default month range. Similarweb data usually lags by one to two months.

endDate.title: End month (YYYY-MM)
endDate.description: Optional end month for traffic and engagement metrics in YYYY-MM format. Leave empty to use the default recent month. The Actor keeps the latest available value in the range.
